sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4197" key="a)liqoko/llhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλιθοκόλλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not cemented</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἶκοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:13:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.13.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
